text: Hi
I looked over your report from urgent care.
I don't recall specifics from that urgent care visit.
Any recent unusual symptoms?

metadata.thought: Ask user about symptoms to identify medical conditions.

text: No unusual symptoms recently, just fatigue...
How long have you felt fatigued?

metadata.thought: Fatigue can be a symptom of many conditions. Ask about duration and severity.

text: I've felt fatigued for about two weeks now.
Any other symptoms besides fatigue?

metadata.thought: Fatigue duration is noted. Ask about other symptoms.

text: I don't recall any other symptoms besides fatigue.
Any changes in diet or sleep?

metadata.thought: No other symptoms noted. Ask about lifestyle factors.

text: No changes in diet or sleep recently...
Are you on any medications?

metadata.thought: No lifestyle changes noted. Ask about medication use.

text: I don't recall any medications I'm taking...
High stress levels recently?

metadata.thought: No medication use noted. Consider asking about stress.

text: I've been feeling really overwhelmed lately, yes...
Sleep quality been affected?

metadata.thought: Stress can cause fatigue. Consider asking about sleep quality.

text: My sleep hasn't been great lately...
Any changes in sleep patterns?

metadata.thought: Sleep issues noted. Consider asking about sleep patterns.

text: My sleep hasn't changed much recently...
Typical sleep duration?

metadata.thought: No changes in sleep patterns noted. Consider asking about sleep duration.

text: I usually sleep around seven hours each night.
Any interruptions in your sleep?

metadata.thought: Seven hours sleep noted. Consider asking about sleep interruptions.

text: I usually wake up several times during the night.
Any changes in sleep environment?

metadata.thought: Sleep interruptions noted. Consider asking about sleep environment.

text: I don't recall any changes in my sleep environment.
Any changes in sleep hygiene?

metadata.thought: No changes in sleep environment noted. Consider asking about sleep hygiene.

text: I've been trying to sleep better lately...
Using any sleep aids?

metadata.thought: Attempts to improve sleep noted. Consider asking about sleep aids.

text: I haven't used any sleep aids recently...
Sleep patterns consistent?

metadata.thought: No sleep aids used. Consider asking about sleep patterns consistency.

text: I usually sleep around eight hours a night.
Sleep quality been good?

metadata.thought: Consistent sleep patterns noted. Consider asking about sleep quality.

text: Not great, been waking up often at night.
